subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! If thou desirest everlasting joy and happiness, kindle thyself with the fire of the love of God, and if [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خدا اگر فرح و شادمانی جاودانی خواهی بنار محبت الله برافروز و اگر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @The Holy Spirit, @humility; meekness; lowliness
